title: scabiosa maritima subsp. cupanii
intro: Scabiosa maritima subsp. cupanii, also known as blue scabious, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Scabiosa, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Scabiosa maritima subsp. cupanii include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical application to alleviate skin irritations and wounds.
